name: standards-comparator emits a structured per-question result with answer and citations array
command: printf '{"question":"q1"}\n' > query.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/comparator-validate.sh" --query query.json --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && node -e "const o=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('result.json','utf8'));if(typeof o.answer===undefined||!Array.isArray(o.citations))process.exit(1);" && echo ok 1>&2
